mainHtml:
About Us/Company Profile

Precision manufacturing partner for R&D and supply chain teams

ProMakeHub focuses on precision manufacturing collaboration and integrates engineering review, manufacturing resources, quality documentation and delivery management into the same service process to help customers more steadily advance prototype validation and low-volume production.

WHO WE ARE

Organize complex manufacturing requirements into deliverables

ProMakeHub focuses on CNC precision machining, rapid prototyping, Surface Finishing and quality documentation collaboration, providing manufacturing support from prototype verification to low-volume delivery for product R&D, procurement and supply chain teams.

Through digital quotation, pre-project review and transparent process records, we help customers shorten the communication cycle and reduce uncertainty in materials, processes, tolerances and delivery documents.

280+Manufacturing and Inspection Equipment
30+Common material and Surface Finishing combinations
99.8%Stable delivery targets and process tracking
FAIFirst article, CMM, and DFM documentation

Capabilities and team structure

Customers can judge whether we match the current project type from the team division of labor, engineering review and delivery support.

01

Project review

Make advance judgments around structure, materials, tolerances, clamping and post-processing risks.

02

Manufacturing collaboration

Connect processing, Surface Finishing, inspection and packaging links to ensure a clear project rhythm.

03

Quality Documentation

Output the first article, size, appearance, material and process record data according to project requirements.

04

Delivery support

Support prototypes, low-volumees and repurchase projects, and develop replicable manufacturing solutions.

How We Work

Replace empty introductions with clear processes so that your company page can serve conversions.

STEP 01Requirements confirmation

Gather drawings, models, quantities, materials, finishing processes and quality requirements.

STEP 02engineering advice

Provide manufacturing feasibility, risk points, alternative materials or structural optimization directions.

STEP 03production execution

Enter production scheduling, processing, testing, post-processing and packaging according to the confirmed plan.

STEP 04Data delivery

Organize inspection records, delivery materials and key project records required for repurchase.

Want to Learn More About Our Capabilities?

Starting from the project stage, part type and delivery requirements, we match the appropriate communication path.

Contact Us
